phase_name: v1.0.0 milestone complete (Phases 1-11) — paused on CI/testing activation

git.head: c04084b
git.remote: NONE — repo has never been pushed to GitHub

completed_tasks.name: Phases 1-9 planned + executed; v1.0.0 milestone archived + tagged
Phase 10 — closed 4 cross-phase integration blockers (milestone audit)
Direct beekeeper-prd.md audit (6 parallel agents) — found 6 more gaps
Phase 11 — closed all 6 PRD-audit gaps; v1.0.0 tag moved to fixed commit c04084b
Confirmed ci.yml is well-wired for cross-platform + eBPF kernel VMs + live eslogger + fuzz, but has NEVER run (no remote)

remaining_tasks.name: git push -u origin main — fires ci.yml for the first time ever
Triage first CI run — expect failures on Linux/macOS/eBPF/-race paths (never executed)
After CI green, git push origin v1.0.0 — fires release.yml (SLSA L3 + cosign + SBOM)

blockers.description: No git remote — all cross-platform/eBPF/eslogger/-race/integration testing is latent in CI and has never executed. Local 'green' = Windows-only go test WITHOUT -race.
blockers.workaround: Create GitHub repo and push to activate CI

human_actions_pending.action: Create a GitHub repository (cosign identity hardcodes github.com/mzansi-agentive/beekeeper) and authorize the push
human_actions_pending.context: Required before any CI/cross-platform/E2E testing can run

decisions.decision: Treat first green GitHub Actions run (not local go test) as the real bar for 'v1.0.0 tested'
decisions.rationale: Linux/macOS/eBPF/-race/integration are CI-only by design (CLAUDE.md); none have run

decisions.decision: Push the v1.0.0 tag only AFTER ci.yml is green
decisions.rationale: Pushing the tag triggers release.yml (SLSA/cosign/SBOM) — don't release an unproven build

uncommitted_files: pre-existing untracked phase-04/05/06/08 PLAN/CONTEXT/RESEARCH docs + beekeeper-tui-prototype.html (not this work)
next_action: Ask the user to create the GitHub repo, then `git remote add origin <url>` and `git push -u origin main`; watch the Actions run and triage failures before pushing the tag.
context_notes: v1.0.0 is functionally complete and PRD-verified at the source level, but UNPROVEN at runtime on Linux/macOS and under -race/eBPF. ci.yml jobs: test (3-OS matrix, -race, Linux go-generate eBPF), test-sentry-kernel-5-4 + 5-15 (cilium/little-vm-helper real kernel VMs), test-eslogger-fields (live macOS eslogger), fuzz/fuzz-ipc/fuzz-llamafirewall, release-gate. release.yml = SLSA L3 + cosign + syft SBOM on tag push. eBPF bytecode is CI-generated (clang/llvm on Linux) — cannot be built/verified on the Windows dev box.
